task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or application menu is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Quality Alerts section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Quality Alerts list, kanban view, or Quality app dashboard is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the target quality alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed form view for the quality alert explicitly titled 'Surface Defects on Cabinet Batch' is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the Vendor field to the target vendor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vendor' field within the 'Surface Defects on Cabinet Batch' quality alert form is populated with 'Wood Corner' or is actively being selected from a dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the changes to the quality alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quality alert form is in a saved/read-only state (or the save button has been clicked) with 'Wood Corner' persistently displayed in the Vendor field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible in a standard browser window. The agent did not use a terminal, python script, or API tool to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the Odoo record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The vendor name 'Wood Corner' is entered into the actual Odoo form field, not just typed into a text editor, search bar, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (like Inspect Element or DOM editor) are open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Alert Name: 'Surface Defects on Cabinet Batch'. Target Vendor Name: 'Wood Corner'. Target Product Name: 'Cabinet with Doors'.
